overview: monedaDigital is a modular platform for restaurants to offer digital menus via QR code. Customers scan a QR code at their table to instantly view the menu on their phone — no app download needed. Future modules will support ordering and cryptocurrency payments. The platform is free for businesses.
features: Role-based access: SUPER_ADMIN, MANAGER, WAITER, KITCHEN
Restaurant data model with full profile fields
Public QR landing page showing restaurant name, logo, and description
Module placeholders: Manager Panel, Customer Menu, Waiter View, Kitchen View, Super Admin Panel
Full bilingual support: Spanish (default) and English with language switcher on every screen
Mobile-first clean design with brand colors #454C92 and #86CCA4
